title: ND's Create simple neo pack
description: An easy to use introduction to Create 6.0.5!
body:
# ND's Create Simple modpack for Neo 1,21,1

This is the simple version of the ND's Create Mod pack For neoforge 1,21,1. This is an easy  to use but that dosen't mean it will Work proably for example if you update any mod of add a create addon there will be a high chance of crashing.

This pack is hosted by [Play.hosting](https://play.hosting/)

[![Click to visit](https://i.postimg.cc/prm4Kp9B/play-hosting.png)](https://play.hosting/)

### If you want to know what mods are installed here they are:
Base (Need to Have mod For this pack)
Create
Minecraft

Addons (for create):
Create copycats +
Create confectionery
create crafts & addion
create more linked
create Parallel pipes
create trains parts
create aquatic ambitions
And more

Performance mods:
sodium
server core
and more

This Modpack will be updated at times and you can request some mods too, but if they are create mods ill check if they are "complex" or "simple" but i'll let you know.

## If you want to check out the other they will be under this text:

ND's NeoForge complex : https://modrinth.com/modpack/nds-create-complex-pack-1.21.1


ND's Forge simple : https://modrinth.com/modpack/nds-create-simple-pack-f1.20.1


ND's Forge complex : Link will be here when its done


ND's Fabric simple : Link will be here when its done


ND's Fabric complex : Link will be here when its done


ND's Quilt simple : Link will be here when its done


ND's Quilt complex : Link will be here when its done




Log:0.0.1
Brand new Modpack.
